top_findings.summary: The skill requests "authentication details" which could include sensitive credentials (e.g., for app APIs, services, or repositories), and it captures extensive data during test execution such as DB diffs, HTTP traces, and screenshots that may contain personal or confidential information. This is excessive because not all use cases (e.g., scenario generation without execution) require authentication, and the skill lacks explicit data minimization measures—like using only test data or anonymizing captured data—raising privacy risks despite safety notes.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests "authentication details" which could include sensitive credentials (e.g., for app APIs, services, or repositories), and it captures extensive data during test execution such as DB diffs, HTTP traces, and screenshots that may contain personal or confidential information. This is excessive because not all use cases (e.g., scenario generation without execution) require authentication, and the skill lacks explicit data minimization measures—like using only test data or anonymizing captured data—raising privacy risks despite safety notes.
